zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Harris於1538年出生在英國英格蘭戴文黑福德時，她的父親William Harris22歲，母親Elizabeth Palmer21歲。她於1562年9月5日與Robert Martyn在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1618年6月在她的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文黑福德。

nameMeanings.name: Harris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Harry
meanings: English (mainly south Wales and southwestern England): from the medieval personal name Harry, a common form of Henry , with assimilation of -nr- to -rr- and regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. In south Wales the surname is generally a post-medieval coinage, in most cases not hereditary until the 18th or 19th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariric, composed of the elements hari, heri ‘army’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Harry (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Haris
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of   Harris  .
Muslim: from the Arabic personal name based on ḥārith, ḥāris ‘plowman, cultivator’. Compare Hares .

variants.name: Harries
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Elfriede, Wolfgang.
North German and East Frisian: variant of   Harjes  .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: English, French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Jamaica and Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’, introduced to England by the Normans in the form Henri. During the Middle Ages this name became enormously popular in England and was borne by eight kings. Continental forms of the personal name were equally popular throughout Europe. In the period in which the majority of English surnames were formed, a common English vernacular form of the name was Harry, hence the surnames Harris (southern) and Harrison (northern). Official documents of the period normally used the Latinized form Henricus. In medieval times, English Henry absorbed an originally distinct Old English personal name that had hagan ‘hawthorn’ (compare Hain 2) as its first element, and there has also been confusion with Amery. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Heinrich , and also their derivatives, e.g. Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ). Compare Henri .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hInnéirghe ‘descendant of Innéirghe’, a byname based on éirghe ‘arising’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Éinrí or Mac Einri, patronymics from the personal names Éinrí, Einri, Irish forms of Henry. It is also found as a variant of McEnery .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Harris was born in 1538, in Sherford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Harris, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Palmer, was 21. She married Robert Martyn on 5 September 1562, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in June 1618, in her hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Sherford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Harris est née en 1538, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Harris, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Palmer, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Martyn le 5 septembre 1562, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1618, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Withycombe Raleigh, Devon, England, King: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 위스이코브 라리 위스 스모우스 앨 세인츠

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Harris(이)가 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 셔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Harris(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Palmer(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1562년 9월 5일 영국 데폰에서 Robert Martyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 6월 그녀의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 셔퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Martyn em 5 de setembro de 1562, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Withycombe Raleigh, Devon, England, King: витикомб реилиг вит эксмоут алл сеинц, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.WITHYCOMBE RALEIGH,DEVON,ENGLAND: витикомб реилиг вит эксмоут алл сеинц, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Harris родилась в 1538 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Harris было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Palmer, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Martyn 5 сентября 1562 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла июнь 1618 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en junio de 1618, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
